wordplay_note: Wife preserved in half-life cold-pac whose signal weakens as Jory consumes her
card_description: Ella Runciter is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Ubik*. Glen's deceased wife maintained in cryonic half-life for consultation. Name note: Wife preserved in half-life cold-pac whose signal weakens as Jory consumes her. The fading signal of the beloved — love persisting across the threshold of death. First appears in *Ubik*.

reference.brief: Glen's deceased wife maintained in cryonic half-life for consultation
reference.significance: The fading signal of the beloved — love persisting across the threshold of death
